features: Get Instant Peace of Mind - Bid farewell to restless nights filled with uncertainty about pregnancy! Our product delivers 99% result accuracy after the FIRST MISSED PERIOD.
Unlock the Ultimate Accuracy - Ensure optimal results by checking your pregnancy test WITHIN the first 10 minutes for the most reliable outcome.

Easy-to-Follow Guidelines - We understand the importance of accurate results, which is why our pregnancy test comes with easy-to-follow instructions. Simply follow the steps provided to achieve precise results.

Confident Testing – Trying for a baby can be an emotional roller coaster. Our pregnancy early response test gives you the confidence to test whenever the moment feels right. Keep one on hand and test multiple times with ease!
You'll receive a package of 3x Midstream tests, individually cased and foil wrapped to ensure freshness. With a minimum 18-month expiry date, you can trust in the quality of our product.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Need a Pregnancy Test? Discover These Essential Health and Personal Care Items! 3pk Pregnancy Tests Add To Basket 100pk Nasal Strips Add To Basket Migraine Relief Cap Buying Options 36pk Spot & Sore Patches Add To Basket 2pk Eye Spray Add To Basket 2pk Vapour Rub 180g Buying Options 42pk Ribbed Condoms Add To Basket Customer Reviews 3.9 out of 5 stars 176 3.3 out of 5 stars 22 4.3 out of 5 stars 31 3.7 out of 5 stars 271 4.1 out of 5 stars 707 4.1 out of 5 stars 431 2.7 out of 5 stars 44 Price £4.99 £ 4 . 99 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 — £4.79 £ 4 . 79 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 — £4.99 £ 4 . 99 Easy to Use ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Clear Results ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Portable ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Travel-Friendly ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Durable Material ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ What is the accuracy of the Clear Response Midstream Pregnancy Test? Our pregnancy test boasts over 99% accuracy, giving you confidence in your results right after your first missed period. How soon can I take the pregnancy test after a missed period? You can test immediately after your first missed period. For best results, check your test within the first 10 minutes. Are the instructions easy to follow? Yes! Each test comes with simple, easy-to-follow guidelines to ensure you achieve accurate and reliable results every time. Can I test multiple times with this pack? Absolutely! The pack contains three individually cased and foil-wrapped tests, providing excellent value for your peace of mind. How long is the shelf life of these tests? Our pregnancy tests have a minimum shelf life of 18 months, ensuring you have reliable tests ready when you need them.
